entries.statement: Design, build, validate, and document clinical trial databases in electronic data capture systems, including CRF specifications, edit check logic, user acceptance testing, and compliance documentation against study protocols and regulatory requirements.
Author, maintain, and enforce enterprise data policies and procedures, ensuring alignment with privacy regulations, internal standards, and regulatory compliance requirements across the organization.

Conduct periodic data compliance assessments using established methodologies, documenting findings, risk ratings, remediation recommendations, and continuous monitoring integration with governance structures.

Prepare, validate, and coordinate regulatory data submissions, managing data collection workflows, verification processes, and submission execution while maintaining accuracy documentation and reporting.

Track compliance remediation activities through closure, monitoring milestones and action completion, escalating blockers, maintaining remediation plans with documented evidence, and ensuring verified closure of findings.

Develop, maintain, and update Records of Processing Activities (ROPA), documenting processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, international transfers, retention periods, and security measures.

Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including identity verification, scope determination, response preparation, exemption assessment, and fulfillment with audit documentation.
Monitor regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and management recommendations.

Conduct Transfer Impact Assessments for international data transfers, evaluating destination country legal frameworks against originating jurisdiction requirements and designing supplementary safeguards where required.

Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and system registrations with supporting documentation.

Coordinate regulatory examination responses, managing examiner interactions, fulfilling information requests, preparing findings responses, developing corrective action plans, and tracking remediation closure.

Conduct AI system risk classification under applicable regulatory frameworks, determining risk categories, identifying applicable requirements, selecting conformity assessment pathways, and documenting classification methodology.
Manage consent lifecycle across organizational systems, including collection configuration, preference storage, withdrawal processing, re-consent campaign execution, and audit record maintenance.

Coordinate organizational data collection requirements and intelligence information needs, managing requirement definitions, coordinating collection sources and priorities, modifying requirements based on operational changes, and evaluating collection results.
